title: Leidos completes acquisition of Cobham Aviation Services Australia's Special Mission business
text: MELBOURNE, Australia and RESTON, Va. , Oct. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced the completed acquisition of Cobham Aviation Services Australia's Special Mission business.

title: Will Segmental Performance Aid Leidos' (LDOS) Q3 Earnings?
text: Leidos' (LDOS) third-quarter results are likely to benefit from the strong revenue performance across most of its segments.

title: TSA Awards Leidos Follow-On Hazmat Services Contract
text: RESTON, Va. , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE:LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, has been awarded a follow-on prime contract by the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) to continue providing hazardous materials (Hazmat) management and disposal services at more than 430 federalized airports.

title: Leidos Secures $1.5 Billion Sentinel Award
text: RESTON, Va. , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, was recently awarded a prime task order to support the Department of Defense.

title: Leidos Partnership Launches New Revenue Cycle Capability for DOD EHR
text: Team Successfully Deploys MHS GENESIS to 18 additional Military Commands in latest Wave RESTON, Va. , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Leidos Partnership for Defense Health (LPDH) today announced it successfully delivered the MHS GENESIS electronic health record to an additional 10,000 clinicians and providers as part of its latest double Wave deployment (Waves JACKSONVILLE/EGLIN), spanning 18 new Military Treatment Facility Commands in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Tennessee, Mississippi and South Carolina.
